title: Can any single satellite keep up with the world’s floods?
content: How well does our current satellite fleet capture the world’s major floods? Scientists turn to the Dartmouth Flood Observatory record for a data-driven answer.
snippet: How well does our current satellite fleet capture the world’s major floods? Scientists turn to the Dartmouth Flood Observatory record for a data-driven answer.

title: Introduction to thermal remote sensing and applications in urban heat island mapping
content: This intermediate-level training equips participants with the foundational theory and practical skills to leverage thermal infrared (TIR) remote sensing to quantify these risks.
snippet: This intermediate-level training equips participants with the foundational theory and practical skills to leverage thermal infrared (TIR) remote sensing to quantify these risks.

title: Launch event: A catalogue of nature-based solutions for coastal resilience
content: The Coastal Catalogue is designed to support the identification of investment opportunities and the integration of NBS into coastal risk management and planning processes.
snippet: The Coastal Catalogue is designed to support the identification of investment opportunities and the integration of NBS into coastal risk management and planning processes.

title: LARAM School 2026: Doctoral school on “landslide risk assessment and mitigation”
content: The School is held annually and is aimed at 40 PhD students and 10 young doctors selected every year from those working in the field of Civil Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Engineering Geology or with a similar Engineering background.

title: Pakistan-NDMA Summer Contingency Plan 2026

title: Pakistan National Disaster Response Plan (NDRP) 2026

title: Pakistan: National Disaster Risk Reduction Strategy (NDRRS) 2025–2030
content: The National Disaster Risk Reduction Strategy  2025–2030 serves as Pakistan's primary strategic roadmap for transitioning from a reactive, response-centric model to a proactive, risk-informed governance framework.

title: Policy and steering instrument recommendations for climate resilience
content: These 13 recommendations aim to help regions adapt faster, smarter, and more systemically, while addressing the needs of vulnerable communities and ensuring long-termsustainability.
snippet: These 13 recommendations aim to help regions adapt faster, smarter, and more systemically, while addressing the needs of vulnerable communities and ensuring long-termsustainability.

title: Regions4Climate
content: The overarching ambition of Regions4Climate is to advance European transitions to climate resilience. The project will provide a suite of user-centred tools and frameworks to support socially-just regional climate resilience transitions.

title: State Comptroller's Office of Israel
content: The State Comptroller's Office is responsible for the external control of the activities of government ministries, the local government, the public bodies, and supervises the management of the financial affairs of the parties and parties.

title: Court of Audit of the Republic of Slovenia
content: In accordance with the Slovenian Constitution, the Court of Audit is the highest body for supervising state accounts, the state budget and all public spending in Slovenia.
snippet: In accordance with the Slovenian Constitution, the Court of Audit is the highest body for supervising state accounts, the state budget and all public spending in Slovenia.

title: Cour des Comptes de Madagascar
content: The Court of Auditors' primary mission is to ensure the effective oversight of public finances and to assist public authorities in promoting good governance.
snippet: The Court of Auditors' primary mission is to ensure the effective oversight of public finances and to assist public authorities in promoting good governance.

title: Thailand: State Audit Office proposes strategic upgrades to early warning system to maximize public safety
content: This is an audit report from the State Audit Office with proposals for strategic upgrades to the early warning system to maximise public safety in Thailand.
snippet: This is an audit report from the State Audit Office with proposals for strategic upgrades to the early warning system to maximise public safety in Thailand.

title: State Audit Office of the Kingdom of Thailand
content: The State Audit Office (Thai: สำนักงานการตรวจเงินแผ่นดิน), previously known as the Office of the Auditor General, is an independent, constitutionally mandated state agency of Thailand.
snippet: The State Audit Office (Thai: สำนักงานการตรวจเงินแผ่นดิน), previously known as the Office of the Auditor General, is an independent, constitutionally mandated state agency of Thailand.

title: Saving our world: Minno’s guide to climate challenges
content: This storybook was developed by Pathfinder’s Advancing the Leadership of Women and Girls Towards Better Health and Climate Change Resilience program.
snippet: This storybook was developed by Pathfinder’s Advancing the Leadership of Women and Girls Towards Better Health and Climate Change Resilience program.

title: School-based disaster risk management guidebook

title: ADN Junior Champion magazine volume 5: Children and youths’ experiences of disasters in Pakistan
content: The theme of the fifth issue is listening to the experiences of Pakistani youth who have experienced devastating floods.
snippet: The theme of the fifth issue is listening to the experiences of Pakistani youth who have experienced devastating floods.

title: Beyond The Brink
content: Beyond The Brink is a podcast with diverse perspectives on Disaster Risk Reduction (DRR) and climate resilience.
snippet: Beyond The Brink is a podcast with diverse perspectives on Disaster Risk Reduction (DRR) and climate resilience.

title: Foresttech
content: ForestTECH News is a monthly update on the latest news, research results, reports and links relevant to forest resource management and planning in Australasia.
snippet: ForestTECH News is a monthly update on the latest news, research results, reports and links relevant to forest resource management and planning in Australasia.

title: Concerns in relation to bushfire preparedness across SE Australia for the 2025/ 26 season and ongoing seasons
content: Every bushfire season, the South East (SE) Australia braces for the flames, and every year, the cycle of destruction, inquiry, and limited reform and learning repeat.
snippet: Every bushfire season, the South East (SE) Australia braces for the flames, and every year, the cycle of destruction, inquiry, and limited reform and learning repeat.

title: Security beyond defence: why Vanuatu should have a national climate security plan
content: In Vanuatu, security can no longer be defined solely through traditional notions of defence and law enforcement. The country’s long-term stability increasingly depends on its capacity to adapt to climate change.

title: Pacific Security College
content: The Pacific Security College is an educational institution dedicated to a peaceful, safe and secure future for all the people of the Blue Pacific.
snippet: The Pacific Security College is an educational institution dedicated to a peaceful, safe and secure future for all the people of the Blue Pacific.

title: Ebb and Flow
content: Ebb and Flow is a digital publication of the California State Water Resources Control Board that explores the science, policy, history and human stories of the state's most precious resource.
snippet: Ebb and Flow is a digital publication of the California State Water Resources Control Board that explores the science, policy, history and human stories of the state's most precious resource.

title: Rainstorms after wildfires: Erosion can threaten water quality for years
content: Heavy rain is often welcome in California. Some years, we're practically desperate for it. Big rain events replenish reservoirs, refill groundwater, and keep ecosystems alive, but can cause major problems in areas burned by wildfires.

title: Japan reveals new name for 40C-and-hotter days after blistering summer
content: Japan has unveiled a new name for days that reach 40C (104F) or above, after the country experienced its hottest summer on record last year.
snippet: Japan has unveiled a new name for days that reach 40C (104F) or above, after the country experienced its hottest summer on record last year.

title: Wildfire mitigation saves money, says Megafire Action
content: It states that every $1 spent on targeted forest management and fuels removal can save up to $7 in future damages and costs.
snippet: It states that every $1 spent on targeted forest management and fuels removal can save up to $7 in future damages and costs.

title: Tuvalu, tiny Pacific nation at the forefront of climate crisis, to host world leaders before Cop31 summit

title: Scientists warn of 3,100 “surging glaciers” that can trigger floods and avalanches
content: Some glaciers don’t just melt—they explode into motion, and climate change is making them far harder to predict.
snippet: Some glaciers don’t just melt—they explode into motion, and climate change is making them far harder to predict.

title: On the Seattle fault, the biggest quakes aren’t the most likely
content: Smaller quakes from secondary faults—which are not included in national seismic hazard modeling—occur more frequently than previously thought.
snippet: Smaller quakes from secondary faults—which are not included in national seismic hazard modeling—occur more frequently than previously thought.
